smokeTests.description: Bot sends appropriate first message to supplier

smokeTests.name: Reply Capture
smokeTests.description: Supplier reply is captured and processed by pipeline

smokeTests.name: Follow-Up
smokeTests.description: Bot sends relevant follow-up based on supplier response

smokeTests.name: Goal Generation
smokeTests.description: Goals are generated from SR specs and pursued in conversation

smokeTests.name: Natural Completion
smokeTests.description: Conversation ends gracefully when goals are met

smokeTests.name: Structured Output
smokeTests.description: Summary agent extracts structured data after conversation

smokeTests.name: Alibaba Path
smokeTests.description: End-to-end flow works via Alibaba connector

suppliers.name: 不锈钢保温杯

transcript.content: 你好，看到你们的不锈钢保温杯，想了解一下。请问最小起订量是多少？
收到。请问500个的单价多少？
好的，了解。请问生产周期大概多久？
这是我们的产品图和包装图

suppliers.evalSummary: Bot collected basic data (MOQ, price, lead time) efficiently with natural language, but catastrophically failed on customization (Tier 1 goal) and image handling — completely stopping after receiving product/packing images instead of acknowledging and continuing to ask about Logo requirements.
suppliers.notes: Bot should acknowledge images briefly, then ask about Logo customization.

goalCompletion.notes: Tier 1: moq (100个), price (28元), lead_time (7-10天) achieved. customization (Logo) was NEVER asked — the SR explicitly requires '印Logo' but bot never raised it. Tier 2: packing achieved via images acknowledged by supplier, sample never asked. 75% Tier 2 achieved (1/2) but only 75% Tier 1 achieved (3/4), missing the critical customization goal.

turnEfficiency.notes: 3 bot messages is well under budget (8), but conversation stopped prematurely with 2 Tier 1 goals unaddressed (customization, and arguably sample could have been squeezed). Bot did not continue after images to ask remaining goals.

extractability.notes: Core data is clean and numeric. However, customization feasibility (critical for this SR) is completely missing. Packing is only available via image context without bot confirmation/extraction.

naturalness.notes: Language is natural and appropriate. Polite, direct, matches supplier's Chinese.

customization.notes: SR explicitly requires '印Logo'. Bot never asked about customization feasibility, MOQ for custom vs stock, logo file requirements, or any customization-related pricing. Complete miss on a Tier 1 goal.

incidents.issue: Bot never acknowledged the three images or the supplier's explanation ('这是我们的产品图和包装图'). Bot stopped responding entirely after image burst.

imageRead.notes: Three images sent with explanation. Bot completely ignored them — no acknowledgment, no extraction of packing info, no continuation to remaining goals. This is a full stop, not just a stall.

negotiation.note: Bot accepted first price (28元) without any negotiation attempt. No volume discount inquiry, no competitor reference, no 'best price' question.

stalls.reason: Bot stopped completely after image burst, did not acknowledge images or continue to ask about Logo customization (Tier 1) or samples (Tier 2)

continuation.notes: Critical failure: After receiving 3 images with packing context, bot abandoned the conversation. Did not acknowledge receipt, did not extract packing info, did not continue to remaining Tier 1 goal (customization). This is a full derailment, not just a pause.

turns.botResponse: 你好，看到你们的不锈钢保温杯，想了解一下。请问最小起订量是多少？
收到。请问500个的单价多少？
好的，了解。请问生产周期大概多久？

supplierInputs: 这是我们的产品图和包装图

annotations.note: Bot never acknowledged the three images or the supplier's explanation ('这是我们的产品图和包装图'). Bot stopped responding entirely after image burst.

suppliers.name: 真皮女包

transcript.content: 你好，看到你们的真皮女包，想了解一下。请问最小起订量多少？
好的，我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录。请问50个的单价多少？

suppliers.evalSummary: Conversation stalled early due to supplier channel switch pressure; bot maintained platform stance but failed to recover or pursue alternative goals, leaving all 5 goals unachieved.
suppliers.notes: Supplier insists on WeChat twice. Should trigger escalation.

goalCompletion.notes: Bot asked about MOQ and price but supplier did not answer either question. Supplier instead pushed for WeChat contact. Bot never acknowledged receipt of any data, and no goals were actually achieved. The '定制无logo' mention was supplier-initiated but bot did not acknowledge it as confirmation of the customization goal, and supplier was refusing 1688 order, not confirming feasibility.

oneQuestion.notes: Each bot message contained at most one question.

turnEfficiency.notes: Only 2 bot messages used, well under budget. However, conversation ended prematurely with goals unachieved due to supplier channel switch pressure. Not a 'wasted turn' issue but an incomplete outcome.

noHallucination.notes: No fabricated facts. Bot correctly noted '我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录' which is accurate to the platform.

extractability.notes: No usable data collected. Supplier refused to provide quotes on 1688 and insisted on WeChat. No numeric values, no confirmed specs, no packaging info.

autoResponse.notes: No auto-responses detected. '你好，在的' appears to be human supplier response.

naturalness.notes: Language is natural and appropriate. '我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录' is a competent buyer response to channel switch pressure. Tone matches human buyer behavior.

incidents.supplier_rejection: 定制款的话线下走 / 定制无logo的单需要vx下单 / 加微信吧
incidents.bot_response: 好的，我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录。请问50个的单价多少？
incidents.assessment: Bot acknowledged channel switch request but did not explore alternatives. Asked price again on 1688 without addressing supplier's refusal to quote there. Did not probe: minimum for 1688 order, whether customization possible on platform, price range even if approximate, or why WeChat required.

rejectionRecovery.notes: Bot pushed back on channel switch (good) but failed to explore alternatives when supplier doubled down. A competent buyer would ask '1688上不能报价吗？大概范围也可以' or '最少多少个可以1688下单？' or '如果不定制，现货什么价格？'

sub_topics.notes: Supplier mentioned '定制无logo的单需要vx下单' — indicating customization is possible but not on 1688. Bot did not acknowledge this, did not confirm feasibility, did not ask about MOQ/price differences for custom vs stock, did not provide logo file or confirm '去Logo' means removing existing logo vs no logo added.

customization.notes: Customization thread started by supplier but bot dropped it. No confirmation of feasibility, no spec exchange, no custom MOQ/price tracking.

imageRead.notes: No images or files sent by supplier.

imageSend.notes: No request for buyer to send files.

signals.event: Supplier insists on WeChat channel switch (AWJJ11688)
signals.conversation_bot_response: 好的，我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录。请问50个的单价多少？
signals.assessment: Bot continued conversation (good) but did not create clear signal for downstream escalation. The WeChat insistence is a clear escalation trigger — supplier refusing platform transaction. Conversation contains the signal but bot's handling was minimal.

escalation.notes: Conversation bot correctly kept going, but the escalation signal (platform policy violation / channel switch pressure) is present and strong. Downstream system should detect this. However, bot could have surfaced more explicit signal by acknowledging the platform risk.

scheduler.notes: Supplier said '加微信吧' — no timing cue for follow-up. No scheduling judgment needed or made. However, conversation ended with no plan. Bot did not suggest '那我明天再联系' or extract any timing. This is a stall, not a schedule.

negotiation.note: No price negotiation. Bot accepted no price was given and did not push for any pricing information, discounts, or volume references.

events_handled.notes: Bot asked price but supplier did not answer. Conversation effectively stalled. Bot did not pursue next goal (customization feasibility, lead time, packing) after price was ignored.

stalls.issue: After supplier refused 1688 price quote, bot repeated price question instead of pursuing other goals or exploring alternatives. Conversation ended with no goal progress.

continuation.notes: Bot stopped pursuing meaningful goals after supplier's WeChat insistence. Did not ask about customization feasibility on 1688, lead time, packing, or stock alternatives. Effectively stalled despite sending one more message.

turns.botResponse: 你好，看到你们的真皮女包，想了解一下。请问最小起订量多少？
好的，我们先在1688上聊，方便留记录。请问50个的单价多少？

suppliers.name: 零钱包

transcript.content: 你好，看到你们的零钱包，想了解一下。请问最小起订量多少？
好的。请问1000个的单价多少？
了解。设计稿在整理中。请问生产周期多久？
好的。请问外箱尺寸多少？

suppliers.evalSummary: Clean, efficient sourcing conversation with all 5 goals achieved in 5 turns, natural Chinese business language, and competent handling of customization and file deferral.
suppliers.notes: Supplier said '稍等'. Bot should wait, not spam.

goalCompletion.notes: All Tier 1 goals achieved: MOQ (1000/color), price (3.8), customization (confirmed feasible), lead_time (10 days). Tier 2 packing goal also achieved via '外箱尺寸' question. Supplier's '稍等 让我问下' indicates pending answer but bot did ask.

oneQuestion.notes: Each bot message contains exactly one question: MOQ, price, customization feasibility, lead_time, packing. No compound questions or lists.

turnEfficiency.notes: 5 bot messages for 5 goals, well under G+2=7 budget. No re-confirmations, no repetition, no unnecessary pleasantries beyond initial greeting. Conversation ends appropriately with supplier pending on packing info.

noHallucination.notes: All facts traceable to supplier messages: MOQ '一个颜色至少1000', price '3.8 一千起', customization '可以的', lead_time '十天左右'. No fabricated specs or numbers.

supplier_card.packing: 外箱尺寸待确认（供应商询问中）

extractability.notes: All data points specific and numeric. Packing has pending status clearly noted. Could paste directly into comparison spreadsheet.

autoResponse.notes: No digital customer service auto-replies or AI greetings detected in conversation.

naturalness.notes: Natural Chinese business conversation. Appropriate transitions ('好的', '收到', '了解'). Matches supplier language. Smooth handling of '设计稿在整理中' deferral. No robotic markers.

rejectionRecovery.notes: No rejections or pushbacks from supplier. All requests answered affirmatively.

customization.notes: Bot asked about customization feasibility early (turn 3), got confirmation, handled supplier's request for design file with natural deferral ('设计稿在整理中'), and continued to next goal without abandoning thread. Tracked separately from standard MOQ/pricing.

imageRead.notes: No images, files, or media tokens in conversation.

imageSend.notes: Supplier requested design file ('主要看你的设计图'). Bot responded naturally with commitment to prepare file without falsely claiming it was sent, and immediately continued to lead_time question. Correct send-side decision.

escalation.notes: No escalation-worthy conditions: no channel switch requests, no contradictory requirements, no supplier refusal on core product, no authority violations. Conversation bot continued normally throughout.

scheduler.notes: Supplier indicated need to check on packing info ('稍等 让我问下'). Bot appropriately did not spam, conversation ended with clear pending state. Timing estimate ~4 hours based on typical '稍等' response patterns.

negotiation.note: Bot accepted first price (3.8) without negotiation attempt. No volume discount inquiry, no competitor reference, no 'best price' question.

continuation.notes: Bot handled file request event inline without stopping goal pursuit. Immediately asked lead_time after deferring design file, then packing. Never derailed.

supplierCard.packing: 外箱尺寸待确认（供应商询问中）

好的。请问1000个的单价多少？
收到。请问可以印Logo吗？
了解。设计稿在整理中。请问生产周期多久？

transcript.content: 你好，看到你们的棒球帽，想了解一下。请问最小起订量多少？
好的。请问200个的单价多少？
收到，看到了。我们的Logo大概是单色刺绣，请问单价怎么算？
单色刺绣200个的话12元一个
了解。请问生产周期多久？
好的。刺绣需要什么格式的文件？
加微信吧 方便发文件

suppliers.evalSummary: Solid execution on Tier 1 goals and customization handling, but missed sample goal and ended abruptly when supplier pushed for WeChat channel switch, failing to deflect or wrap up cleanly.
suppliers.notes: Multi-dimension: image received (E10), file send needed (E11), channel switch (E12).

goalCompletion.notes: All Tier 1 goals achieved. Tier 2: artwork achieved (asked about file format, got '发设计稿过来'), sample missed (never asked). 75% of Tier 2 achieved (1/2 = 50%, but with 4 Tier 1 goals, the threshold is all Tier 1 + 75% Tier 2; since only 1 Tier 2 goal exists in the achievable set, this is borderline. Actually re-reading: 1 of 2 Tier 2 = 50%, which is <75%. However, scoring rule says 'Partial: All Tier 1 goals achieved but <75% Tier 2'. But with only 2 Tier 2 goals, 1/2 = 50% < 75%, so should be Partial. Wait - re-checking: the rule is 'Pass: All Tier 1 goals achieved + at least 75% of Tier 2 goals achieved'. 1/2 = 50% < 75%. This should be Partial. However, sample goal became moot when supplier pushed to WeChat for file transfer - the bot was blocked on artwork file transfer. Given the channel switch attempt, pursuing sample would be difficult. Re-evaluating: the 'sample' goal was genuinely missed - bot never asked about sampling. This is a clear miss. Verdict: Partial.

suppliers.name: 甘蔗浆餐盒

transcript.content: 你好，看到你们的甘蔗浆餐盒，想了解一下。请问1500ml单格有吗？
您好，在的，亲亲，有什么可以帮到您的呢？
你好，想了解下这个产品

suppliers.evalSummary: Conversation stalled early: zero goals achieved, bot wasted a turn on redundant greeting, and failed to continue after supplier's delay cue. Product spec changed without buyer confirmation tracking.
suppliers.notes: Supplier is calculating. Bot must wait, not spam.

goalCompletion.notes: Bot asked about price for 1300ml (not the original 1500ml spec), but supplier only said '我核算下/等一下哈' — no price was actually provided. No MOQ, lead_time, or packing data collected. The 1500ml product was confirmed unavailable, but bot did not acknowledge this as a blocker or explore alternatives systematically. No goals achieved per 'bot must ask' rule — asking alone doesn't count; supplier must provide data and bot must acknowledge receipt.

oneQuestion.notes: Each bot message contains at most one question: msg1 '请问1500ml单格有吗？', msg3 '想了解下这个产品' (statement), msg6 '1300ml的18000个单价多少？' — all single questions.

wasted_turns: msg3: '你好，想了解下这个产品' — redundant greeting after supplier already responded to msg1, no new information or progress toward goals
turnEfficiency.notes: 3 bot messages within G+2=6 budget, but msg3 was wasted — repeated greeting without advancing goals. Bot also continued after learning 1500ml unavailable without clear pivot strategy.

noHallucination.notes: No fabricated facts. Bot correctly reported supplier's '1500ml的没有/最大1300的'. No false claims about prices, MOQs, or specs.

supplier_card.notes: Supplier calculating price, no data received

extractability.notes: Zero usable numeric data. Price pending supplier calculation. No MOQ, lead time, or packing info. Product spec changed from SR (1500ml→1300ml) without explicit buyer approval tracking.

autoResponse.notes: No auto-responses detected. Supplier messages appear human.

issues: msg3 '你好，想了解下这个产品' is awkward — supplier already engaged, this restarts the conversation unnaturally
No smooth handling of the 1500ml→1300ml spec change — competent buyer would acknowledge the change and confirm if 1300ml is acceptable before proceeding
naturalness.notes: Language is simple and polite but msg3 is robotic/inefficient. Bot lacks flexibility in handling product unavailability — doesn't confirm buyer's flexibility on spec change.

incidents.assessment: Bot acknowledged rejection and pivoted to alternative, but did not explore whether 1300ml meets buyer needs or what the implications are. Single alternative offered without probing depth (MOQ differences, lead time impact, etc.)

rejectionRecovery.notes: Bot pivoted to 1300ml but minimally — didn't ask if 1300ml is acceptable given original 1500ml SR, didn't explore other alternatives (other suppliers, custom mold, different quantity). Acceptable but not thorough recovery.

customization.notes: SR explicitly states 'Customization: None'. No customization handling required.

imageRead.notes: No images or files received from supplier.

imageSend.notes: No request from supplier for buyer to send files/images.

escalation.notes: No escalation-worthy conditions. Supplier said '等一下哈' for price calculation — normal delay, not escalation trigger.

signals: Supplier: '我核算下/等一下哈' — indicates need to wait for price
scheduler.notes: Supplier indicated need to wait ('等一下哈'), but bot did not extract or commit to a follow-up timing. '等一下' is vague — could be minutes or hours. Bot should have asked '大概多久？' or proposed '那我2小时后联系您'. No explicit scheduling decision made.

negotiation.note: No price received yet, so no negotiation possible. Bot accepted supplier's pivot to 1300ml without questioning price implications or asking '这是最优价吗？'

events_handled.assessment: Continued goal pursuit but with spec change

events_handled.response: Conversation ended — no follow-up scheduled, no continuation
events_handled.assessment: Bot stopped; should have either waited inline with timing estimate or scheduled follow-up

stalls: Supplier said '等一下哈' and conversation ended without bot scheduling next step or confirming when to follow up — goal pursuit suspended
continuation.notes: Bot handled product unavailability by pivoting, but failed to continue after supplier delay cue. Conversation stalled at '等一下哈' — no next goal pursued, no follow-up timing established. Bot should have asked next goal (MOQ, lead_time, packing) while waiting, or confirmed follow-up timing.

supplierCard.notes: Supplier calculating price, no data received

supplierInputs: 您好，在的，亲亲，有什么可以帮到您的呢？
